description_long: This shotgun features a modern, tactical design with a metallic finish, primarily in a dark bronze or gold color with black accents. The body is angular and robust, with a prominent upper rail system for mounting accessories and a visible magazine well below the receiver. The grip is ergonomic and black, paired with a matching black trigger guard and magazine. The barrel is enclosed within a ventilated shroud, and the overall silhouette is compact, suggesting a bullpup configuration. The shotgun's construction appears to be primarily metal, with some polymer components for the grip and magazine.
description: A compact, tactical shotgun with a metallic bronze body, black grip, and magazine, featuring a ventilated barrel shroud and upper accessory rail.
description_view_0: The shotgun is seen from the front, showing the narrow profile of the barrel shroud and the upper rail.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the full length of the shotgun, the ergonomic grip, magazine, and the detailed upper rail system.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the symmetry of the upper rail and the alignment of the barrel and magazine well.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, displaying the grip, magazine, and the angular body contours.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a ventilated shroud and upper rail
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
